title: Create Workspace Via Automation
excerpt: It would be fantastic to create a new workspace via automation once an item’s status has changed or an item has been created. Ideally allowing the workspace to be named using column with in the board the automation is si…

posts.author: VAHeckley (Richard Heckley)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be fantastic to create a new workspace via automation once an item’s status has changed or an item has been created. Ideally allowing the workspace to be named using column with in the board the automation is situated. Very similar to the automation for creating a board from a template.
